title: Entity Description
description: Identifies the entity and provides base construction metadata.

is_experimental.title: Is Experimental
is_experimental.description: Whether this entity is experimental and only enabled with the experimental toggle.

is_summonable.title: Is Summonable
is_summonable.description: Whether this entity can be summoned via the /summon command.

runtime_identifier.description: The vanilla Minecraft entity identifier used to build this entity from (e.g. minecraft:horse).

is_spawnable.title: Is Spawnable
is_spawnable.description: Whether this entity has a spawn egg in the creative inventory.
